title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
